NEEDLE MOVERS
Sharing your wins is one of the fastest ways for the entire mastermind to grow together faster.
With this tool, it is time to share with the group the things in your business or life that have had the
biggest positive impact in the past 90-180 days.
Name 	Date
What is the biggest needle mover in the last 90-180 days?
What are 3 positive impacts it has made (ie: revenue, less complexity, sold products, etc.)?
How can you add fuel to it to make it even better?
What’s the #1 thing it could do for you and your business in the next 12 months?
What are the 3 steps you could share with the group so they can model it?
growth tool
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
